reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio recuperada, sanitarios en condiciones y limpios.
El freeshop con variedad de productos.

(Translated by Google)
It's a renovated gas station with clean and well-maintained restrooms.
The duty-free shop offers a variety of products.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocTdfTktBEAE

reviews.comment:
El baño es un asco, necesita estar limpio porque  es un servicio que están brindando y está muyyyy sucio, tratar de corregir  esta falencia,  asi levantamos el pulgar hacia arriba

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom is disgusting; it needs to be cleaned because it's a service they're providing, and it's filthy. Try to correct this deficiency, and then we'll give it a thumbs up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoODZfSFN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención en el minimarket. Solo reciben efectivo donde deberían recibir transferencias, débito o mercado pago al menos.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service at the minimarket. They only accept cash where they should at least accept transfers, debit cards, or Mercado Pago.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoODZxLWFBEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
